case_title: MIKE GARZA VS. CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: MTN FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER GARZA, MIKE HEARING SET FOR MAY-29-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF KATHLEEN BROWN FILED BY DEFENDANT ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL DEPARTMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MIKE GARZA'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILED TO SHOW THAT RESPONDENT IS UNDER A DUTY TO ACT IN A PARTICULAR WAY OR ABUSED ITS DISCRETION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4675 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MIKE GARZA'S Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate is Denied. Petitioner failed to show that Respondent is under a duty to act in a particular way or abused its discretion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)
